SourceText: Today’s lesson is about teaching your child about ✅ safe and ❌ unsafe touch.
text: Vandag se les gaan oor hoe om jou kind te leer oor ✅ veilige en ❌ onveilige aanraking.

SourceText: 💡 It is normal to feel uncomfortable talking to children about abuse.
text: 💡Dit is normaal om ongemaklik te voel om met kinders te praat oor mishandeling.

SourceText: ❗ But there are some simple things that can help them understand when it is not OK to be touched, and what they should do if something ever happens.
text: ❗Maar daar is eenvoudinge goed wat hulle kan help verstaan wanneer dit nie reg is om aangeraak te word nie, en wat hulle moet doen as dit gebeur.

SourceText: 🔑 It lets them know that they are in control of who can touch their body and in what way.
text: 🔑 Dit laat hulle weet dat hulle in beheer is van wie hulle liggaam kan aanraak en op watter manier.

SourceText: 🌷 This prepares them to keep themselves safe throughout their lives!
text: 🌷 Dit berei hulle voor om hulself regdeur hul lewens veilig te hou!

SourceText: Let's do a quiz!

SourceText: True or False: Parents should wait until their children are school-aged before talking about risks of sexual abuse.
text: Waar of Vals: Ouers moet wag tot hulle kinders op skoolgaande ouderdom is voordat hulle oor die risiko's van seksuele mishandeling praat.

SourceText: 👀 Oops! That's not actually true.
text: 👀 Oeps! Dit is eintlik nie waar nie.

SourceText: 🌷 It is never too early to talk with your child about how to keep them safe from sexual abuse.
text: 🌷 Dit is nooit te vroeg om met jou kind te praat oor hoe om hulle veilig te hou van seksuele mishandeling nie.

SourceText: 🧸 Even young children can learn about which parts of their body are private and which parts are public.
text: 🧸 Selfs jong kinders kan leer watter dele van hulle liggaam privaat is en watter dele publiek is.

SourceText: 💡 They can also learn that it is important for them to tell you if anybody touches them in an inappropriate way.
text: 💡 Hulle kan ook leer dat dit belangrik is om jou te vertel as iemand hulle op 'n onvanpaste manier aanraak.

SourceText: ⭐ That’s right.
text: ⭐ Dit is reg.

SourceText: Sorry, I don't understand what you mean.

SourceText: Here's another one:

SourceText: 💚 Thank them for being brave and for telling you so they feel safe to talk to you if anything ever happens again.
text: 💚 Bedank hulle dat hulle so dapper is en dat hulle jou vertel het, sodat hulle veilig kan voel as enige iets ooit weer gebeur.

SourceText: 💡 This teaches them that their safety matters most.
text: 💡Dit leer hulle dat hulle veiligheid die belangrikste is.

SourceText: ❗ Confronting the person who did it often makes it worse, so it is better to help your child stay away from the person and report them to the police or at a clinic.
text: ❗ Gewoonlik maak dit dinge erger as jy die oortreder konfronteer, so dit is beter om jou kind te help om weg te bly van die persoon en hulle te rapporteer aan die polisie of by 'n kliniek.

SourceText: {F1_FATHER} wants to help his young children learn about safe and unsafe touch. Let’s see how he has the conversation with his young son, {F1_SON_5}.
text: {F1_FATHER} wil hulle jong kind help om te leer van veilige en onveilige aanraking. Kom ons sien hoe hy die gesprek met sy jong seun, {F1_SON_5}, voer.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: Did you enjoy the story, {F1_SON_5}?
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Het jy die storie geniet, {F1_SON_5}?

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Yes, {F1_FATHER}! It was fun!
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Ja, {F1_FATHER}! Dit was pret!

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**:  Now, there are some important things I want to talk to you about. It's about keeping your body safe and healthy.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Nou is daar 'n paar belangrike goed waaroor ek met jou wil gesels. Dit gaan oor hoe om jou liggaam veilig en gesond te hou.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: What do you mean, {F1_FATHER}?
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Wat bedoel jy, {F1_FATHER}?

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: First, we all have private parts on our bodies. These are the parts that are covered by our underwear.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Eerstens, ons het almal privaatdele op ons liggame. Dit is die dele wat bedek word deur ons onderklere.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Like this?
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Soos dit?

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: Exactly. It's important to remember that these parts are private, and no one should touch them except to keep you clean and healthy.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Presies. Dit is belangrik om te onthou dat die dele privaat is, en niemand aan dit moet raak nie, behalwe om dit skoon en gesond te hou.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: Your body belongs to you, and you have the right to say "no" if someone wants to touch you in a way that feels uncomfortable or wrong.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Jou liggaam behoort aan jou, en jy het die reg om 'nee' te sê as iemand jou wil aanraak op 'n manier wat ongemaklik of verkeerd voel.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Okay, {F1_FATHER}.
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Oukei, {F1_FATHER}.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: And if anything ever happens that makes you feel scared or uneasy, remember you can always come and tell me or {F1_MOTHER}. We're here to protect you and keep you safe.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: En as enige iets ooit gebeur wat jou bang of onrustig laat voel, onthou jy kan altyd vir my of {F1_MOTHER} kom vertel. Ons is hier om jou te beskerm en veilig te hou.

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: I will tell you and {F1_MOTHER}, {F1_FATHER}.
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Ek sal vir jou en {F1_MOTHER} vertel, {F1_FATHER}.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: We love you, **{F1_SON_5}. Now, let's give each other a big hug!
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Ons is lief vir jou, {F1_SON_5}. Nou, kom ons gee vir mekaar 'n groot drukkie!

text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: Hallo seun. Jy skop daai bal so goed en lyk so sterk! Ek wens ek kon 'n bal soos jy skop. Wat is jou naam?

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: My name is {F2_SON_8}.
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: My naam is {F2_SON_8}.

SourceText: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, such a beautiful name.
text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, dit is so 'n mooi naam.

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: Thank you.
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: Dankie.

SourceText: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, I have chips and some toys for you in my car. If you come in, you can eat chips and play with all the toys, I promise…
text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F2_SON_8}, Ek het skyfies en 'n paar speelgoed vir jou in my motor. As jy in klim, kan jy skyfies eet en met al die speelgoed speel, ek belowe…

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: No, thank you.
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: Nee, dankie.

SourceText: **{F2_SON_8}**: Graaannnnyyyyyy!!
text: **{F2_SON_8}**: Ouuuuumaaaaaaa!!

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: {F2_SON_8}, I’m so proud of you for not getting out of our yard and getting into the car. You remembered the rules we created about safety in this community. That was a dangerous situation. You are so brave. Thank you for telling me. I will report it so it doesn’t happen again.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: {F2_SON_8}, ek is so trots op jou dat jy nie uit ons erf uit gegaan het en in die motor geklim het nie. Jy het die reëls onthou wat ons geskep het oor veiligheid in die gemeenskap. Dit was 'n gevaarlike situasie. Jy is so dapper. Dankie dat jy my vertel het. Ek sal dit rapporteer sodat dit nie weer gebeur nie.

SourceText: This lesson is about learning how to respond when our children are in crisis.❗
text: Hierdie les gaan jou leer hoe om te reageer wanneer jou kind in 'n krisis is. ❗

SourceText: When our children share something that is very hard or upsetting to them😔😣, we need to remember to stay calm, listen, and be open, so that they feel supported. 💛
text: Wanneer ons kinders iets deel wat baie moeilik of ontstellend is vir hulle😔😣, moet ons onthou om kalm te bly, te luister en oop te wees, sodat hulle geondersteun kan voel. 💛

SourceText: True or False: When my child is upset, I should wait for them to come to me. I don’t want to upset them further by asking what is troubling them.
text: Waar of Vals: Wanneer my kind ontsteld is, moet ek vir hulle wag om na my toe te kom. Ek wil hulle nie verder ontstel deur te vra wat pla hulle nie.

SourceText: 😣 When children are in crisis, they may be scared to tell others about it for many reasons. They may be worried about others judging them or getting angry. They may also feel shame.
text: 😣 Wanneer kinders in krisis is, mag hulle bang wees om vir ander te vertel vir baie redes. Hulle mag bekommerd wees dat ander hulle sal oordeel of sal kwaad word. Hulle mag dalk selfs skaamte voel.

SourceText: 💚 You can ask your child very calmly about why they seem upset. 👀
text: 💚 Jy kan jou kind baie rustig vra hoekom hulle ontsteld lyk. 👀

SourceText: 👂 Assure them that you are proud of how brave they are to share their crisis with you.
text: 👂Verseker hulle dat jy trots is op hoe dapper hulle is om die krisis met jou te deel.

SourceText: 🌷 That’s right!
text: 🌷 Dit is reg!

SourceText: {F1_SON_5} looks upset. Let’s see how his father responds:
text: {F1_SON_5} lyk ontsteld. Kom ons kyk hoe sy pa reageer:

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: I don't want to play with Daniel today.
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Ek wil nie vandag met Daniel speel nie.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: What happened, {F1_SON_5}? I thought you and Daniel were friends. Do you want to talk about it?
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Wat het gebeur, {F1_SON_5}? Ek het gedink jy en Daniel is vriende. Wil jy daaroor praat?

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}** (crying): He and some of the other kids were mean to me. They said I was stupid because I can’t button my shirt properly.
text: **{F1_SON_5}** (huil): Hy en 'n paar van die ander kinders was lelik met my. Hulle het gesê ek is dom omdat ek nie my hemp reg kan knoop nie.

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}** : Oh my {F1_SON_5}, that is not a very nice thing to say to someone. I can understand why you would feel upset about this.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Ag nee {F1_SON_5}, dit is nie 'n baie mooi ding om vir iemand te sê nie. Ek kan verstaan hoekom jy ontsteld sal voel oor dit.

SourceText: First of all, you are not stupid! I am so proud of how much you are growing and learning. It is important that Daniel and the others know that it is not okay to say mean things. Would you like me to come with you so that we can have a chat with the others together?
text: Eerste van als, jy is nie dom nie! Ek is so trots oor hoe baie jy groei en leer. Dit is belangrik dat Daniel en die ander weet dat dit nie reg is om lelike goed oor ander te sê nie. Wil jy hê ek moet saam met jou kom, sodat ons saam met die ander kan praat?

SourceText: **{F1_SON_5}**: Okay…
text: **{F1_SON_5}**: Oukei…

SourceText: **{F1_FATHER}**: I can also have a chat with Daniel's parents to let them know. Daniel is a good boy and is usually nice to you so maybe there is something else happening.
text: **{F1_FATHER}**: Ek kan ook met Daniel se ouers praat en hulle laat weet wat aangaan. Daniel is 'n goeie seun en is gewoonlik gaaf teenoor jou, so dalk is daar iets anders wat aangaan.

SourceText: Thank you for sharing with me, {F1_SON_5}. I am very proud of you.
text: Dankie dat jy dit met my deel, {F1_SON_5}. Ek is baie trots op jou.

SourceText: ▶️ Press play to learn the 4️⃣ four things you can do to support your child when they share something difficult with you.
text: ▶️ Druk Speel om die 4️⃣vier dinge te leer wat jy kan doen om jou kind te ondersteun wanneer hulle iets moeilik met jou deel.

SourceText: 4️⃣ Here are four things you can do to support your child when they share something difficult with you:
text: 4️⃣Hier is vier goed wat jy kan doen om jou kind te ondersteun wanneer hulle iets moeilik met jou deel:

SourceText: 1️⃣ BREATHE: Take a pause
text: 1️⃣ HAAL ASEM: Vat 'n blaaskans

SourceText: 🌱 Take a deep breath so you can respond calmly.
text: 🌱Haal diep asem sodat jy rustig kan reageer.

SourceText: 💛 Ask yourself, “What does my child need right now?”
text: 💛Vra jouself, "Wat het my kind nou nodig?"

SourceText: 2️⃣ LISTEN: Ask your child what is going on
text: 2️⃣ LUISTER: Vra jou kind wat aangaan

SourceText: 👂 Let your child share with you what they need. Sometimes, it may be easier for your child to draw what happened instead of explaining it.
text: 👂Laat jou kind met jou deel wat hulle nodig het. Soms, is dit makliker vir jou kind om te teken wat gebeur het eerder as om dit te verduidelik.

SourceText: 👀 Notice what they are feeling and tell them what you notice so they feel heard.
text: 👀 Let op na hoe hulle voel en vertel vir hulle wat jy op let sodat hulle weet hulle word gehoor.

SourceText: 💙 Tell your child that you are there for them and love them.
text: 💙 Vertel vir jou kind jy is daar vir hulle en lief vir hulle.

SourceText: 😣Both girls AND boys could face hard times and crisis situations. Remember to check-in with both.
text: 😣 Beide meisies EN seuns kan moeilike tye en situasies ervaar. Onthou om vir albei te vra hoe dit gaan.

SourceText: 3️⃣ RESPOND: What might help?
text: 3️⃣ REAGEER: Wat mag dalk help?

SourceText: 🔶 You might need to help your child talk about their feelings.
text: 🔶 Jy mag dalk nodig hê om jou kind te help om oor hulle gevoelens te praat.

SourceText: ⏸ In the moment, your child needs you to be there for them with love and accept their feelings.
text: ⏸ In die oomblik het jou kind jou nodig om daar te wees met liefde en hulle gevoelens te aanvaar.

SourceText: ➡️ You might need to talk about the actions that you or your child could take to help with what has happened.
text: ➡️ Jy mag dalk moet praat oor die aksies wat jy of jou kind kan neem om te help met wat aangaan.

SourceText: ✅ Remember, you can always type {HELP} to ParentText and get information about resources in your community where you can receive help.
text: ✅ Onthou, jy kan altyd {HELP} in ParentText tik en inligting kry oor hulpbronne in jou gemeenskap waar jy hulp kan ontvang indien jy dit nodig het.

SourceText: 4️⃣ COMFORT: Be there for your child
text: 4️⃣ TROOS: Wees daar vir jou kind

SourceText: 🌷 It can be hard to see your child feeling upset or confused, but there is a lot you can do to support them.
text: 🌷 Dit kan moeilik wees om jou kind ontsteld of verward te sien, maar daar is baie wat jy kan doen om hulle te ondersteun.

SourceText: 💚 They need you to accept them and comfort them when difficult things are going on.
text: 💚 Hulle het nodig dat jy hulle aanvaar en troos wanneer moeilike dinge aangaan.

SourceText: 🔄In these moments, maintaining a consistent routine can be particularly helpful. Familiar routines can provide a sense of security and normalcy, helping your child feel safe again.
text: 🔄In hierdie oomblikke kan dit besonders nuttig wees om 'n konsekwente roetine te handhaaf. Bekende roetines kan 'n gevoel van sekuriteit en normaliteit bied, wat jou kind help om weer veilig te voel.

SourceText: 🎈 Remind your child again that you love them, and thank them for sharing with you.
text: 🎈 Herinner jou kind weer dat jy hulle liefhet, en sê dankie dat hulle met jou gedeel het.

SourceText: Amazing! 💙 This can help prepare you and your child to face hard situations AND avoid them in the first place.
text: Wonderlik! 💙 Dit kan jou en jou kind help voorberei om moeilike situasies te hanteer EN hulle in die eerste plek te vermy.

SourceText: {F3_DAUGHTER_7} is in trouble. Let’s see how her mother responds:
text: {F3_DAUGHTER_7} is in die moeilikheid. Kom ons kyk hoe haar ma reageer:

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: My dear, you look really upset, do you want to tell me what happened?
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: “My skat, jy lyk regtig ontsteld. Wil jy vir my vertel wat gebeur het?”

SourceText: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: It’s my uncle, he… he… he touched me.
text: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Dis my oom, hy... hy... hy het aan my gevat.

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}** (thinking): Take a deep breath... What does my child need? She needs me to be calm and listen.
text: **{F3_MOTHER}** (dink): Haal diep asem… Wat het my kind nodig? Sy het nodig dat ek kalm bly en luister.

SourceText: Come and sit down next to me. Take your time, I’m listening.
text: Kom sit hier langs my. Vat jou tyd, ek luister.

SourceText: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: It’s true, he… he… made me very uncomfortable… he touched my body and told me I’d be in trouble if I told anybody! I didn’t want to do anything with him, and I even said NO, but he told me I would be in trouble.
text: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Dit is waar, hy… hy… het my baie ongemaklik laat voel… hy het aan my liggaam geraak en vir my gesê dat ek in die moeilikheid sal wees as ek vir enige iemand vertel! Ek wou niks met hom doen nie, en ek het selfs NEE gesê, maar hy het gesê ek sal in die moeilikheid wees.

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: You are so brave for sharing this with me. You are not in trouble. This is not your fault. Thank you for telling me.
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Jy is so dapper om dit met my te deel. Jy is nie in die moeilikheid nie. Dit is nie jou skuld nie. Dankie dat jy my vertel het.

SourceText: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Yesterday, when you went to see your friend, he just came here and that’s when it happened.
text: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Gister, toe jy jou vriend gaan sien het, het hy net hier gekom, en dit is toe dit gebeur het.

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: It’s okay, I believe you, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}. You have done the right thing telling me. What happened is not OK, but I am here for you to help you and support you.
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Dis oukei, ek glo jou, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}. Jy het die regte ding gedoen om dit vir my te vertel. Wat gebeur het, is nie reg nie, maar ek is hier om jou te help en te ondersteun.

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: We will need to talk to someone who will help keep you safe. Would that be okay, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}? I will be with you the whole time.
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Ons sal met iemand moet praat wat sal help om jou veilig te hou. Sal dit oukei wees, {F3_DAUGHTER_7}? Ek sal die hele tyd by jou wees.

SourceText: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Yes… Okay… where will we go?
text: **{F3_DAUGHTER_7}**: Ja… oukei… waarheen gaan ons?

SourceText: **{F3_MOTHER}**: We can go to the clinic. And {F3_DAUGHTER_7} remember this is not your fault. I love you. We will get through this.
text: **{F3_MOTHER}**: Ons kan na die kliniek toe gaan. En {F3_DAUGHTER_7} onthou dit is nie jou skuld nie. Ek is lief vir jou. Ons sal hierdeur kom.

SourceText: Children are spending a lot of time online.⏰ Being connected helps them stay positive and learn more 🔑 but there are also some risks and dangers.🚩
text: Kinders spandeer baie tyd aanlyn.⏰ Om verbind te wees help hulle om positief te bly en meer te leer, 🔑 maar daar is ook 'n paar risiko's en gevare.🚩

SourceText: True or False: Parents should set time limits on how long their child can use the internet each day.

SourceText: This lesson is about learning how to keep your teens safe in your community. 🚩
text: Hierdie les gaan oor hoe om jou tieners veilig te hou in die gemeenskap. 🚩

SourceText: You are not alone! Parents all over the world say they worry about keeping their children safe.
text: Jy is nie alleen nie! Ouers regoor die wêreld sê hulle is bekommerd oor hoe om hulle kinders veilig te hou.

SourceText: Let’s test your knowledge about teen safety.
text: Kom ons toets jou kennis oor tienerveiligheid.

SourceText: Which of these is a space guaranteed to keep your teen safe?
text: Watter een van hierdie ruimtes is gewaarborg om jou tiener veilig te hou?

SourceText: Your teen can face harm anywhere, even at home 🏠 or church ⛪. As parents, it's our job to help them plan 📝 to avoid tough situations and handle them if they happen, no matter where they are 🌍.
text: Jou tiener kan enige plek, selfs by die huis 🏠 of in die kerk ⛪, gevaar in die gesig staar. As ouers is dit ons plig om hulle te help beplan 📝 om moeilike situasies te vermy en te hanteer as dit gebeur, maak nie saak waar hulle is nie 🌍.

SourceText: 🎉You're right.
text: 🎉Jy is reg.

SourceText: Let’s check in on {F1_DAUGHTER_16} and her mom:
text: Kom ons kyk hoe dit met {F1_DAUGHTER_16} en haar ma gaan:

SourceText: **{F1_DAUGHTER_16}**: Something happened when I was out with my friends {FRIEND_FEMALE_1} and {FRIEND_FEMALE_2}!
text: **{F1_DAUGHTER_16}**: Iets het gebeur toe ek saam met my vriende, {FRIEND_FEMALE_1} en {FRIEND_FEMALE_2} uit was!

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Tell me, {F1_DAUGHTER_16}
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Vertel my, {F1_DAUGHTER_16}

SourceText: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: Hey beautiful. I have been looking at you for a while. You are very beautiful, what’s your name?
text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: Hallo mooiste. Ek kyk nou al 'n rukkie na jou. Jy is baie mooi, wat is jou naam?

SourceText: **{FRIEND_FEMALE_1}**: Her name is {F1_DAUGHTER_16}
text: **{FRIEND_FEMALE_1}**: Haar naam is {F1_DAUGHTER_16}

SourceText: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F1_DAUGHTER_16}, would you like to come with me to have something to drink and chips? Come on, get in, you’ll be back in time, I promise…
text: **{MAN_IN_CAR}**: {F1_DAUGHTER_16}, wil jy saam met my ietsie kom drink en skyfies eet? Kom aan, klim in, jy sal betyds terug wees, ek belowe…

SourceText: **{F1_DAUGHTER_16}**: I’m not sure if that’s a good idea…
text: **{F1_DAUGHTER_16}**: Ek is nie seker of dit 'n goeie idee is nie…

SourceText: **{FRIEND_FEMALE_1}**: You are lucky, my friend. I wish a man would ask ME out and buy me gifts. I’m telling you, if you don’t do this I’m going to tell everyone you are stupid!
text: **{FRIEND_FEMALE_1}**: Jy is gelukkig, vriendin. Ek wens ’n man wil MY uitvra en vir my geskenke koop. Ek sê jou, as jy dit nie doen nie, gaan ek vir almal vertel dat jy dom is!

SourceText: **{FRIEND_FEMALE_2}**: {F1_DAUGHTER_16} don’t go! Be careful! Let’s go home. It is dangerous to go with people you don’t know. Besides, he’s too old for you and what he is doing is wrong.
text: **{FRIEND_FEMALE_2}**: {F1_DAUGHTER_16} moenie gaan nie! Wees versigtig! Kom ons gaan huis toe. Dit is gevaarlik om saam met mense te gaan wat jy nie ken nie. Buitendien, hy is te oud vir jou en wat hy doen, is verkeerd.

SourceText: **{F1_DAUGHTER_16}**: I just don’t know…
text: **{F1_DAUGHTER_16}**: Ek weet net nie…

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Pfff, I am so proud of you that you did not get into the car. That was a dangerous situation, thank you for telling me!
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Pfff, ek is so trots op jou dat jy nie in die motor geklim het nie. Dit was ’n gevaarlike situasie, dankie dat jy my vertel het!

SourceText: One way to keep your teen safe is to create a safety map with them. Together, identify the safe and unsafe places in your community. 📖
text: Een manier om jou tiener veilig te hou, is om 'n veiligheidskaart saam met hulle te skep. Identifiseer saam die veilige en onveilige plekke in jou gemeenskap. 📖

SourceText: Here are 3️⃣three steps to help you make a safety map together:
text: Hier is 3️⃣ stappe om jou te help om saam 'n veiligheidskaart te maak:

SourceText: Step 1️⃣: **DRAW**
text: Stap 1️⃣: **TEKEN**

SourceText: 🚩 Include the main places: streets, your house, school, shops, and places your teen visits.
text: 🚩 Sluit die hoof plekke in: strate, jou huis, skool, winkels en plekke wat jou tiener besoek.

SourceText: Step 2️⃣: **DECIDE**
text: Stap 2️⃣: **BESLUIT**

SourceText: 👂 Listen to your teen: they might know more than you think they do about where it is safe or unsafe.
text: 👂 Luister na jou tiener: hulle weet dalk meer as wat jy dink oor waar dit veilig of onveilig is.

SourceText: 🔵 CIRCLE the places that are safe for teenagers.
text: 🔵 OMKRING die plekke wat veilig is vir tieners.

SourceText: ❌ CROSS OFF any places that are unsafe for teenagers.
text: ❌ DEURKRUIS enige plekke wat onveilig is vir tieners.

SourceText: Step 3️⃣: **DISCUSS**
text: Stap 3️⃣: **BESPREEK**

SourceText: 👀 Discuss where you and your teen can get support in a crisis. These places may include home, school, police station, or a clinic.
text: 👀 Bespreek waar jy en jou tiener ondersteuning kan kry in 'n krisis. Hierdie plekke kan jou huis, skool, polisiestasie of 'n kliniek insluit.

SourceText: 🚩 MARK these areas clearly with a ⭐ star on your map.
text: 🚩 MERK hierdie plekke duidelik met 'n ⭐ ster op jou padkaart.

SourceText: Create a community safety map with your teen. Make sure to listen to their thoughts too!
text: Skep 'n gemeenskap veiligheidskaart saam met jou tiener. Maak seker dat jy ook na hulle gedagtes luister!

SourceText: Do you have time to do it today? 🚩
text: Het jy vandag tyd om dit te doen? 🚩

SourceText: Amazing! This is a great way to build trust with your teen and keep them safe.
text: Fantasties! Dit is 'n wonderlike manier om vertroue met jou tiener te bou en hulle veilig te hou.

SourceText: That's OK! Plan to set aside an hour in the next few days to work on this map with your teen. It's a great way to build trust with them and keep them safe.
text: Dit is OUKEI! Beplan om 'n uur in die volgende paar dae opsy te sit om aan hierdie kaart met jou tiener te werk. Dit is 'n uitstekende manier om vertroue met hulle te bou en hulle veilig te hou.

text: Druk Speel ▶️ om die 3️⃣ drie stappe te leer om saam 'n veiligheidskaart te maak:

SourceText: It can be hard to think about dangerous situations for your teen.
text: Dit kan moeilik wees om aan gevaarlike situasies vir jou tiener te dink.

SourceText: To keep our teens safe, we need to understand their reality and the potential risky situations they can find themselves in.
text: Om ons tieners veilig te hou, moet ons hul werklikheid en die potensiële gewaagde situasies waarin hulle hulself kan bevind verstaan.

SourceText: We can help our teens know how to use their thoughts and voices, in dangerous situations. It makes a big difference!
text: Ons kan ons tieners help om hulle gedagtes en stemme in gevaarlike situasies te gebruik. Dit maak 'n groot verskil!

SourceText: Check out these scenarios. What warning signs do you see?
text: Kyk na hierdie scenario's. Watter waarskuwingstekens sien jy?

SourceText: **Boy**: Hey beautiful, why are you walking so fast! Don’t you want to come show us what is under that skirt?
text: **Seun**: Hallo mooiste, hoekom loop jy so vinnig! Wil jy nie vir ons kom wys wat onder daardie rompie is nie?

SourceText: It’s okay to compliment and show attention, but it must be done respectfully.
text: Dit is oukei om komplimente en aandag te gee, maar dit moet met respek gedoen word.

SourceText: In this case, the boy’s friend should speak up and correct his friend’s behaviour.
text: In hierdie geval moet die seun se vriend iets sê en sy vriend se gedrag regstel.

SourceText: Let’s try another. What are the warning signs?
text: Kom ons probeer nog een. Wat is die waarskuwingstekens?

SourceText: **{TEACHER_1}**: {F2_DAUGHTER_17}, if you want to get good grades this year, you need to stay after school when everyone is gone so I can tutor you.
text: **{TEACHER_1}**: {F2_DAUGHTER_17}, as jy goeie punte hierdie jaar wil kry, moet jy na skool bly wanneer almal weg is sodat ek jou kan help.

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: My friend also needs support. Can I invite her too?
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: My vriendin het ook ondersteuning nodig. Kan ek haar ook nooi?

SourceText: **{TEACHER_1}**: No, this will be our secret. You don’t want people to think you are stupid, right?
text: **{TEACHER_1}**: Nee, dit sal ons geheim wees. Jy wil nie hê mense moet dink jy is dom nie, wil jy?

SourceText: 🎉That’s right.
text: 🎉Dit is reg.

SourceText: Schools have strict rules to keep students safe. The teacher is abusing his power and knows it's wrong ❌. He has likely done this before and might do it again 🔁. {F2_DAUGHTER_17} could try to find others with the same experience 👥 to make reporting him easier 🗣️.
text: Skole het streng reëls om studente veilig te hou. Die onderwyser misbruik sy mag en weet dit is verkeerd ❌. Hy het waarskynlik dit al voorheen gedoen en mag dit weer doen 🔁. {F2_DAUGHTER_17} kan probeer om andere met dieselfde ervaring te vind 👥 om dit makliker te maak om hom te rapporteer 🗣️.

SourceText: The correct answer was “The teacher abuses his power and pressures the girl”.
text: Die korrekte antwoord was: "Die onderwyser misbruik sy mag en druk die meisie.".

SourceText: In a dangerous situation, we might freeze ❄️ or get angry 😡 – that’s normal. Press Play ▶️ to learn the tools that can help keep you and your teen safe: **KNOW IT, SEE IT, SAY IT**
text: In 'n gevaarlike situasie mag ons vries ❄️ of kwaad word 😡 – dit is normaal. Druk Speel ▶️ om die hulpmiddels te leer wat jou en jou tiener kan help om veilig te bly: **KEN DIT, SIEN DIT, SÊ DIT**

SourceText: In a dangerous situation, we might freeze ❄️ or get angry 😡 – that’s normal. These tools can help keep you and your teen safe: KNOW IT, SEE IT, SAY IT
text: In 'n gevaarlike situasie, mag ons vries ❄️ of kwaad word 😡 – dit is normaal. Hierdie hulpmiddels kan help om jou en jou tiener veilig te hou: KEN DIT, SIEN DIT, SÊ DIT

SourceText: 1️⃣ **KNOW IT**
text: 1️⃣ **KEN DIT**

SourceText: Know the difference between healthy and unhealthy relationships ❤️❌. If you're attacked, it’s never your fault. Do what you need to stay safe and get away —don't worry about what others think. You are worth defending 💪. You are strong and powerful ⚡.
text: Ken die verskil tussen gesonde en ongesonde verhoudings ❤️❌. As jy aangeval word, is dit nooit jou skuld nie. Doen wat jy moet om veilig te bly en weg te kom — moenie bekommerd wees oor wat ander dink nie. Jy is die moeite werd om te verdedig 💪. Jy is sterk en kragtig ⚡.

SourceText: 2️⃣ **SEE IT**
text: 2️⃣ **SIEN DIT**

SourceText: If someone makes you or anyone else feel uncomfortable with what they say or do, it’s never okay! We all have the right to feel safe, especially at home 🏠. Trust your gut. If you feel attacked by words or actions, your goal is to get away.
text: As iemand jou of iemand anders ongemaklik laat voel met wat hulle sê of doen, is dit nooit reg nie! Ons het almal die reg om veilig te voel, veral by die huis 🏠. Vertrou jou intuïsie. As jy deur woorde of aksies aangeval voel, is jou doel om weg te kom.

SourceText: 3️⃣ **SAY IT**
text: 3️⃣ **SÊ DIT**

SourceText: Your voice can stop many attacks.
text: Jou stem kan baie aanvalle stop.

SourceText: Be clear, confident, and direct. Use your voice, body language, and eye contact. If you don't feel safe, you can do whatever it takes to get away.
text: Wees duidelik, selfversekerd en reguit. Gebruik jou stem, liggaamstaal en oogkontak. As jy nie veilig voel nie, kan jy doen wat nodig is om weg te kom.

SourceText: Using your voice can look different in different situations. You could shout "No!", call for help, act strangely to confuse the attacker, or negotiate.
text: Om jou stem te gebruik kan in verskillende situasies anders lyk. Jy kan "Nee!" skree, om hulp roep, vreemd optree om die aanvaller te verwar, of onderhandel.

SourceText: Here are some things you might say or shout to avoid a tough situation:
text: Hier is 'n paar goed wat jy kan sê of skreeu om 'n moeilike situasie te vermy:

SourceText: “I will call the police if you touch me again 🚔.”
text: "Ek sal die polisie bel as jy weer aan my raak 🚔."

SourceText: “Do not touch my bum!” 👎
text: "Moenie aan my boud raak nie!" 👎

SourceText: Or you might say:
text: Of jy kan dalk sê:

SourceText: “No lift for me, thanks! Last time I got a lift, I threw up!” 🤮
text: "Geen geleentheid vir my nie, dankie! Laas keer toe ek 'n geleentheid gekry het, het ek opgegooi!" 🤮

SourceText: “I will give you my phone if you let me go.” 📱
text: "Ek sal vir jou my telefoon gee as jy my laat gaan."

SourceText: Think about what you would do in some of the examples we have looked at. There is no wrong answer! ✨
text: Dink aan wat jy sou doen in sommige van die voorbeelde wat ons na gekyk het. Daar is geen verkeerde antwoord nie!✨

SourceText: Remember, if someone hurts you, it’s never your fault. Ask someone you trust for help 🤝. Make sure your teen knows they can tell you anything so you can find a solution together.
text: Onthou, as iemand jou seermaak, is dit nooit jou skuld nie. Vra iemand wie jy vertrou om jou te help🤝. Maak seker jou tiener weet hulle kan jou enigiets vertel sodat julle saam 'n oplossing kan vind.

SourceText: Help your teen be prepared by repeating this lesson together. To repeat this lesson you can type {PREVENT} after we finish. Can you do it today?
text: Help jou tiener voorberei deur hierdie les saam te herhaal. Om hierdie les te herhaal kan jy {PREVENT} tik nadat ons klaar is. Kan jy dit vandag doen?

SourceText: That’s great! ✨
text: Dit is wonderlik! ✨

SourceText: That's OK! 💛Plan to set aside an hour in the next few days to have this conversation with your teen.
text: Dit is OUKEI! 💛Beplan om 'n uur opsy te sit in die volgende paar dae om hierdie gesprek met jou tiener te hê.

SourceText: Excellent work 🎉. You have completed the Prevent Sexual Violence lesson. You have now completed @(fields.c_n_mod_compl +1) out of @fields.c_n_mod lessons in the course {goal_name}. This lesson can be difficult to complete. Remember to take a pause and care for yourself 💛.
text: Uitstekende werk 🎉. Jy het die Voorkom Seksuele Geweld-les voltooi. Jy het nou @(fields.c_n_mod_compl +1) uit @fields.c_n_mod lesse in die kursus {goal_name} voltooi. Hierdie les kan moeilik wees om te voltooi. Onthou om 'n blaaskans te vat en vir jouself te sorg 💛.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: This lesson is about learning how to respond to crises when they happen. ❗
text: Hierdie les handel oor hoe om te leer om op krisisse te reageer wanneer dit gebeur. ❗

SourceText: When our teens share something that is very hard or upsetting to them, we need to remember to stay calm, listen, and be open so that they feel supported. 💛
text: Wanneer ons tieners iets deel wat baie moeilik of ontstellend is vir hulle, moet ons onthou om kalm te bly, te luister en oop te wees, sodat hulle geondersteun kan voel. 💛

SourceText: Here is an example of supporting  your teen, even when something really bad happens.
text: Hier is ’n voorbeeld van hoe om jou tiener te ondersteun, selfs wanneer iets baie slegs gebeur.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Shame my dear, you look really upset, do you want to tell me what happened?
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Siestog my skat, jy lyk regtig ontsteld. Wil jy vir my vertel wat gebeur het?

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: It’s my Uncle, he… he… he touched me.
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Dis my Oom, hy... hy... hy het aan my gevat.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER} (thinking): Take a deep breath... What does my child need? She needs me to be calm and  comforting and to listen if she wants to talk.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}** (dink): Haal diep asem… Wat het my kind nou nodig? Sy het nodig dat ek kalm en vertroostend is, en dat ek luister as sy wil praat.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Come and sit down next to me. Take your time, I’m listening.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Kom sit hier langs my. Vat jou tyd, ek luister.

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: It’s true, he… he… made me do it! He made me have sex with him! I didn’t want to, I swear, and I even said NO, but he told me I would be in trouble.
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Dit is waar, hy… hy… het my gedwing! Hy het my laat seks hê met hom! Ek wou nie, ek belowe, en ek het selfs NEE gesê, maar hy het gesê ek sou in die moeilikheid wees.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Thank you for sharing this with me. You are not in trouble. This is not your fault.
text: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: Dankie dat jy dit met my gedeel het. Jy is nie in die moeilikheid nie. Dit is nie jou skuld nie.

SourceText: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Yesterday when you went to see your friend. He just came and that’s when it happened.
text: **{F2_DAUGHTER_17}**: Gister, toe jy jou vriend gaan sien het, het hy net gekom, en dit is toe dit gebeur het.

SourceText: **{F2_GRANDMOTHER}**: It’s okay, I believe you my child. This is a big thing and we will find a way to get the help we need. Where could we go for help?

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: {F1_DAUGHTER_13}, have you done your homework?
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: {F1_DAUGHTER_13}, het jy al jou huiswerk gedoen?

SourceText: **{F1_DAUGHTER_13}**: Just a minute, I'm finishing this TikTok video.
text: **{F1_DAUGHTER_13}**: Net 'n minuut, ek maak hierdie TikTok-video klaar.

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: You are a really great dancer! Tell me about why you like it.
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Jy is regtig 'n baie goeie danser! Vertel my hoekom jy daarvan hou.

SourceText: **{F1_DAUGHTER_13}**: All my friends are on it. I have more than 600 likes and 120 followers.
text: **{F1_DAUGHTER_13}**: Al my vriende is daarop. Ek het meer as 600 likes en 120 followers.

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: I’m proud of how well you dance, {F1_DAUGHTER_13}. But we need to make sure you are safe on this. I know your friends look at TikTok, but with an open account there are also paedophiles who look at videos of teenagers. Paedophiles are adults who are sexually attracted to young children and teens.
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Ek is trots op hoe goed jy dans, {F1_DAUGHTER_13}. Maar ons moet seker maak dat jy veilig is. Ek weet jou vriende kyk na TikTok, maar met ’n oop rekening is daar ook pedofiele wat na video’s van tieners kyk. Pedofiele is volwassenes wat seksueel aangetrokke is tot jong kinders en tieners.

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Let’s look together online at how we can keep this fun for you but also safe. Look – you can make your account private and control who follows you. So you can accept people you know but not strangers. Can we make a rule together that you can use TikTok but with a private account? I trust you to know who to accept!
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Kom ons kyk saam aanlyn hoe ons dit vir jou prettig kan hou, maar ook veilig. Kyk – jy kan jou rekening privaat maak en beheer wie jou volg. So, jy kan mense aanvaar wat jy ken, maar nie vreemdelinge nie. Kan ons saam 'n reël maak dat jy TikTok kan gebruik, maar met 'n privaat rekening? Ek vertrou jou om te weet wie om te aanvaar!

SourceText: **{F1_MOTHER}**: I’m proud of you {F1_DAUGHTER_13}...
text: **{F1_MOTHER}**: Ek is trots op jou, {F1_DAUGHTER_13}...

SourceText: 💙 If you come across anything worrying together, talk about it with your teen. If you need support, type {HELP} after you complete today’s lesson or any other time you need extra support.
text: 💙 As julle saam iets kommerwekkend teëkom, praat daaroor met jou tiener. As jy ondersteuning nodig het, tik {HELP} nadat jy vandag se les voltooi het of enige ander tyd wat jy ekstra ondersteuning nodig het.

SourceText: 🚩Teach your teen that if a stranger offers gifts, like virtual coins, in exchange for photos and personal information and tells them to keep it a secret, they should tell you.
text: 🚩Leer jou tiener dat as 'n vreemdeling geskenke aanbied, soos virtuele munte, in ruil vir foto’s en persoonlike inligting, en hulle vra om dit geheim te hou, hulle dit vir jou moet vertel.

SourceText: 🌷 Together, look at websites, social media, games, and apps your teen uses.
text: 🌷 Kyk saam na die webwerwe, sosiale media, speletjies en toepassings wat jou tiener gebruik.

SourceText: 👂 Ask questions - this helps you learn more about your teen’s interests!
text: 👂 Vra vrae - dit help jou om meer oor jou tiener se belangstellings te leer!

SourceText: ✅ Tell your teen that they should tell an adult if they feel scared, unsafe or upset about something online.
text: ✅ Vertel vir jou tiener dat hulle 'n volwassene moet inlig as hulle bang, onveilig of ontsteld voel oor iets aanlyn.

SourceText: Take these steps to keep your teen safe online:
text: Neem hierdie stappe om jou tiener veilig te hou aanlyn:

SourceText: 📝 Write down or draw the apps and websites your teen uses.
text: 📝 Skryf neer of teken die programme en webwerwe wat jou tiener gebruik.

SourceText: 🏅Praise your teen for how good they are at using the web!
text: 🏅Prys jou tiener vir hoe goed hulle die internet gebruik!

SourceText: 🔴 Talk about which sites or apps might be unsafe. Why?
text: 🔴 Praat oor watter webwerwe of toepassings onveilig kan wees en hoekom?

SourceText: 📱 Together, talk about how @fields.child_nickname and their friends can use the internet more safely.
text: 📱 Praat saam oor hoe @fields.child_nickname en hulle vriende die internet veiliger kan gebruik.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

text: 📱 Praat saam oor hoe jou tiener en hulle vriende die internet veiliger kan gebruik.
